Hearing On The Merits
Off Calendar Jul-16-2020 Denied

Hearing On The Merits
Off Calendar Jun-18-2020 Continued To Jun-24-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 608

Hearing On The Merits
Off Calendar Jun-12-2020 Continued To Jun-19-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 608

CEQA CASE MANAGEMENT DEPARTMENT
Off Calendar Jan-16-2020 Continued To Jan-22-20 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 608

Ex Parte Applicastion To Alter Briefing Schedule
Off Calendar Mar-02-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Susan Brandt-Hawley, of Brandt-Hawley Law Group, Tel. 707-938-3900, appearing for petitioners;
Audrey Pearson, Deputy City Attorney, of City and County of San Francisco, Tel. 415-554-4621, appearing for respondents;
No other appearances.

Ruling: The matter is discussed. The parties have previously stipulated to an amended briefing schedule, and further stipulate to a Second Stipulation and Order to Alter Briefing Schedule to allow additional time for the opposition brief.

The Court grants the Ex Parte Application for Stipulated Order to Alter Briefing Schedule. The Court shall revise the proposed order, and sign the order. The Court instructs counsel to deliver courtesy copies directly to Dept. 503.

Judge: Rochelle East; Clerks: Felicia Green & Alvin Mok; Not reported; Dept. 608.

CEQA CASE MANAGEMENT DEPARTMENT
Off Calendar Jan-22-2020 Text Ruling
